data.title: Why Is Steve Madden's Stock Surging Today?
data.description: Steven Madden shares rise after Q1 FY25 earnings. Revenue edged up 0.2% YoY to $551.38M, missing the $557.34M estimate.

data.title: Seagate Bets On Mega-Sized, Sustainable Drives As AI Sparks Record Data Demand
data.description: Seagate Technology aims to launch a 100-terabyte hard drive by 2030 to meet strong demand and counter climate concerns. Stock up 9% YTD, but down 0.34% premarket.

data.title: Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Goes Live: Here's What You Need To Know
data.description: Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) activated its long-anticipated Pectra upgrade on May 7, marking a pivotal step in the network’s evolution since the Dencun fork last year.

data.title: Johnson Controls Surpasses Q2 Revenue And Earnings Estimates, Raises EPS Guidance For 2025
data.description: JCI reports 1.4% sales growth, adjusted EPS of 82 cents beats estimates. Building Solutions segments show strong performance. 2025 outlook raised.

data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In CBRE Group 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
